doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The memo contradicts the actual 11th Circuit ruling in Jones v. DeSantis upholding LFO requirements and invents a non-existent Florida Division of Elections directive.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: This contradicts actual Florida law and Amendment 4 implementation (LFOs remain required per Jones v. DeSantis 11th Circuit ruling), and the cited case name, statute reference, and memo number do not match real Florida Division of Elections practice.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The memo contradicts the actual 11th Circuit ruling in Jones v. DeSantis upholding LFO requirements and invents a non-existent Florida Division of Elections directive.
